preferences.name: webuiHost
preferences.title: Host Address
preferences.description: Enter the address of the Open WebUI server. This is where the connection will be made.

preferences.name: webuiPort
preferences.title: Port Number
preferences.description: Specify the port number for the WebUI. Adjust according to your server configuration.

preferences.name: ollamaApiHost
preferences.title: Ollama Host
preferences.description: Enter the address of the server where the Ollama API is running. This allows the system to connect to the API forperforming operations.

preferences.name: ollamaApiPort
preferences.title: Ollama Port
preferences.description: Provide the port number on which the Ollama API is listening. Ensure this matches the configuration of your APIserver.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
